 First, we know that the woman died in the accident, Her son was taken to the hospital for emergency surgery.  Next, the key point of the riddle is that the surgeon says, "I can't operate on this boy. he's my son."  So, the question is asking us to explain why the surgeon can't operate on the boy,  The answer to this riddle lies in the relationship between the surgeon and the boy.  The surgeon is the boy's father.  Therefore, the surgeon can't operate on the boy because he is the boy's father.  So, the surgeon says, "I can't operate on this boy. he's my son."  This is possible because the surgeon is the boy's father.  Therefore, the answer to the riddle is that the surgeon is the boy's father.
